titleStmt.title: SII 41.325: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 325. (A.R. No. 541 of 1905.) Tiruveḷḷaṟai, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the margin of the well called Nālumulaikkēni at Tiruveḷḷaṟai.

summary.p: Records the construction of the well called Māṟpiḍugu perungiṇaṟu by one Kampan-Araiyan the younger brother of a certain Visaiyanalluḻān of Ālambākkam. The work was commenced in the 4th, Year of Dantivarman and completed in his 5th, Year. The tank was put under the protection of the ‘group of 3700’ of the village. The Tamil verse exhorts all to do good things in this life, remembering that life is short and uncertain.
[Published in Epigraphia Indica Vol. XI No. 15.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . bhāradvāja gotrattiṉ vaḻittoṉṟiya pallavatilaka kulodbhavaṉ tanniparmmaṟku yāṇṭu nāṉkāvateṭuttukkoṇṭu Aintāvatu muṟṟuvittāṉ Ālampākka vicaiya nallūḻāṉ
tampi kampaṉ Araiyaṉ tiruveḷḷaṟaitteṉṉūrp peruṅkiṇaṟu Itaṉ piyar mārppiṭukuperuṅkiṇaṟeṉpatu .—itu rakṣippār Ivvūr muvāiratteḻunūṟṟuvarum .—

śrīkaṇṭār kāṇā vulakattiṟ kātal ceytu nillātey paṇṭey paramaṉ paṭaitta nāḷ pārttu niṉṟu naiyyātey
taṇṭār muppuvan tuṉṉait taḷaracceytu nillāmuṉ ṉuṇṭelluṇṭu mikkatu Ulakam maṟiyavaimiṉey
Digital edition of SII 41.325 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
